text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As I'm walking past the gym...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Curses, I was so close to beating<n>Ryan's record!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is that... Oh, you're one of the<n>school's
trainers!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'm working on my free throw.<n>I'm tryna
beat Mejiro Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ryan can nail way more consecutive<n>free throws
than me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Which makes her... the thirty-ninth<n>rival I gotta
defeat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You think so? I'm pretty sure that's<n>kinda
average...
choice_data_list: Who else do you need to beat?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, Oguri is my race rival. Bakushin<n>O is my club
head rival. Then, I have<n>Biko who is my rival for
protecting the<n>school's peace...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I can't forget Fukukitaru! I'm<n>competing
against her to see who can<n>win the most ice pop
stick prizes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh crap! Today's supposed to be my<n>ice pop
showdown with her! I almost<n>forgot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'd better get going! See you<n>later!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory hurriedly puts the<n>basketball
away and runs out the exit.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'm in it to win it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But I'm not doing this just towin, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The true victory I'm aiming for is one<n>achieved
after my rival and I have<n>pushed each other to
the limit and<n>battled our hearts out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's what a victorious victory<n>really
means! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ack! What am I talking like such a big<n>shot for?
I'm still just a greenhorn!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I didn't mean to be rude!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory dashes towards<n>the exit and
out of the gym at the<n>speed of light.
